Title: Upload HR source files

As a HR operator
I want resume and receipt upload paths inside HR
So that candidate and device workflows can start from source files

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] The HR module exposes upload-related actions through Oliver and page UI.
- [ ] HR upload helpers are wired into the shared assistant/upload infrastructure.
